headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 14, 2026**
article:
The Baltimore Orioles secured a convincing 7-0 victory over the New York Yankees, with Kyle Bradish leading the way on the mound. Bradish pitched 6.0 innings, striking out 7 batters and allowing just 1 hit. Meanwhile, the Cleveland Guardians took down the Los Angeles Angels in a 2-4 showdown, with Parker Messick earning the win after 6.2 innings of work.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Colorado Rockies right-handed pitcher Jimmy Herget, who has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right shoulder impingement. Other notable injured players include Brooks Kriske of the Athletics, Robby Snelling of the Miami Marlins, Francisco Alvarez of the New York Mets, Rhett Lowder of the Cincinnati Reds, Drew Pomeranz of the Los Angeles Angels, Dylan Beavers of the Baltimore Orioles, and Grant Wolfram of the Baltimore Orioles.

The Arizona Diamondbacks made a move to bolster their roster, acquiring outfielder Jose Requena from the Los Angeles Dodgers in exchange for center fielder Alek Thomas. The San Francisco Giants traded catcher Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians for left-handed pitcher Matt Wilkinson and other considerations. The Philadelphia Phillies traded right-handed pitchers Enyel Garcia and Maicol Lauriano to the Baltimore Orioles for cash.

top_news.title: **Yankees Fall to Orioles in Dominant 7-0 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a convincing 7-0 victory over the New York Yankees, with Kyle Bradish leading the way on the mound. Bradish pitched 6.0 innings, striking out 7 batters and allowing just 1 hit.

top_news.title: **Guardians Take Down Angels in 2-4 Showdown**
top_news.summary: The Cleveland Guardians secured a 2-4 victory over the Los Angeles Angels, with Parker Messick earning the win after 6.2 innings of work. Zach Neto led the Angels' offense with 2 hits, including a home run, and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Nationals Edge Reds in Thrilling 8-7 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals secured a hard-fought 8-7 win over the Cincinnati Reds, overcoming a late deficit to claim the game. Tyler Stephenson led the Reds' offense with a home run and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Rockies Rout Pirates 10-4**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies dominated the Pittsburgh Pirates, securing a 10-4 victory. Mickey Moniak led the Rockies' offense with a 3-hit, 1-home run, 5-RBI performance.

top_news.title: **Rockies RHP Jimmy Herget Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Colorado Rockies right-handed pitcher Jimmy Herget has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to a right shoulder impingement, effective retroactive to May 13, 2026.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Acquire Requena in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks have made a move to bolster their roster, acquiring outfielder Jose Requena from the Los Angeles Dodgers. Requena joins the Diamondbacks in exchange for center fielder Alek Thomas.
